Testing obfuscation, optimization, and edge cases:

Opaque predicate (call): 10
Opaque predicate (param): 20
Instruction substitution (call): 225
String encryption (param): 74
Tail call optimization (param): 500500
Non-tail call (param): 5050
Vectorized loop (call): 396
Link-time optimization: 20
Division by zero: 1
Null pointer dereference: 41
Buffer overflow: 30
Integer overflow: 2000000000
Undefined behavior: 10
Implementation-defined: 44
